title: Crucible (disambiguation)
content:
'''Crucible''' can refer to:

==Canon==
*The '''''[[Crucible]]''''', a [[Paladin-class corvette|''Paladin''-class corvette]].

==Legends==
*The '''''[[Crucible/Legends|Crucible]]''''', a [[Jedi training cruiser/Legends|Jedi training cruiser]].
*The '''''[[Crucible (Imperial-class)|Crucible]]''''', an [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]].
*The '''''[[Crucible (MC80 Star Cruiser)|Crucible]]''''', a [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari Star Cruiser]].
*'''[[The Crucible]]''', a [[Slavery/Legends|slave-trading]] organization.
**'''[[Crucible cant]]''', the Crucible [[Language/Legends|language]].
*The '''[[Crucible (arena)|Crucible]]''', an arena on [[Dathomir/Legends|Dathomir]] that housed the [[Nightsisters/Legends|Nightsisters]]' [[Selection/Legends|Selection]].

==Out of universe==
*'''''[[Crucible (novel)|Crucible]]''''', a novel by [[Troy Denning]].
*'''[[Star Wars (1977) 17|''Star Wars'' (1977) 17]]''', the 17th issue of [[Star Wars (1977)|''Marvel Star Wars'']].

{{Disambig}}
